rationale: OSS feature (all changed paths under web/src/). No skip gates apply: not an enterprise feature, no existing test files modified, no explicit skip markers, and the change is user-facing — it adds a new page at /test-demo with interactive UI elements (fruit select, cascading country→city selects, mode toggle Basic/Advanced, conditional Priority select, and a combined-rule banner for Cherry+High). Route is registered in router.ts and a nav entry appears in MainLayout. No API changes. Placed in GeneralTests area as a standalone demo page; playwright group GeneralTests maps directly to the same folder in the CI matrix.
